what_was_requested: ETAP 3: Settlement Cycle (cf_settlement_cycle) feature development, validation, and standalone backtest
what_was_done:
1. Inspected events catalog - confirmed funding settlement events exist (7143 rows, last refreshed 2026-04-07T17:13:08)
2. Validated cf_settlement_cycle custom feature code - initially failed due to wrong function signature (compute_series vs compute), then failed due to ctx.df accessor (needed ctx.series)
3. Published cf_settlement_cycle feature - FAILED with error 'Managed feature event input is missing for family=funding selector=anchor_symbol'. Event sync was initiated (events_sync family=funding) but the publish operation timed out before event store was fully refreshed
4. Cloned active-signal-v1-regime-gate strategy to cf-settlement-cycle-test snapshot
5. Validated signal logic with bars_until_funding_settlement builtin column - PASSED
6. Ran backtest plan - confirmed readiness with valid window 2021-03-24 to 2026-03-20
7. Executed backtest run 20260407-174738-e49952ea - COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY
8. Retrieved final backtest results with full metrics
artifacts: feature:cf_settlement_cycle (validation attempted, publish blocked on event sync)
error: cf_settlement_cycle custom feature publication failed due to event store timing issue (family=funding selector=anchor_symbol missing). The backtest used the cloned regime-gate strategy WITHOUT the cf_settlement_cycle feature in signal logic, so results are identical to baseline (Shrpe=1.385, PnL=$1520.78). The feature itself needs event sync completion before it can be published and integrated into strategy logic.
